title: Taylor Swift Grooming Allegations
about: Taylor Swift Grooming Allegations refers to accusations that pop artist Taylor Swift has groomed several underage men, including celebrities like Harry Styles, Taylor Lautner and Conor Kennedy. She was photographed holding hands or kissing the aforementioned men when some of them were allegedly underage or still in high school. Meanwhile, Swift was in her early 20s. The allegations and photographs resurfaced en masse in early October 2025, following the release of Swift's album The Life of a Showgirl in which she reportedly dissed fellow popstar Charlie XCX on the track "Actually Romantic." The discourse about Swift's grooming accusations resurfaced because Twitter / X users joked about Charlie XCX having the chance to bring up the allegations on a diss track as an homage to rapper Kendrick Lamar's diss track "Not Like Us" aimed at Drake.
origin:
In 2009, Taylor Swift dated Twilight actor Taylor Lautner for three months. The two reportedly met in July 2009 while filming the 2010 movie Valentine's Day, in which they played high school lovers.[1][2] Lautner was 17 and Swift was 19 when they met and dated.[3][4]

In July 2012, Taylor Swift reportedly befriended the matriarch of the Kennedy family, Ethel Kennedy, and was photographed sailing with the Kennedy family in Hyannis Port, Massachusetts, on July 4th.[5] At the time, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s son, Conor Kennedy, was 17 and turning 18 later that month.[6] Swift started dating Kennedy shortly after he turned 18 while she was 22.[7][2]

In December 2012, Taylor Swift began dating One Direction member Harry Styles, who was 18 at the time. Swift was 23.[8][2]

On July 6th, 2022, X[9] user @4HasBeyn shared a graphic compiling photos of Taylor Swift with the aforementioned men paired with their ages at the time of their relationships. The graphic incorrectly labeled Swift as 20 during her relationship with Lautner and also incorrectly claimed that Styles was still in high school. The graphic also misrepresented Kennedy's age in the photo of him kissing Swift.

It's unclear if the user created the infographic or not, but the tweet is the earliest discovered upload of it online. It received over 140 likes in three years. The image would later become the leading piece of media in the grooming allegations against Swift.
